pattern: Construct a length-n string where every character's frequency is odd, using a parity observation on n.
hints: If n is odd, a string of n identical characters already satisfies the condition.
If n is even, use (n-1) copies of one character and 1 copy of a different character.
Both resulting frequencies (n-1 and 1) are odd when n is even, so this always works.

edge_inputs.description: n=2 even requires two distinct chars
